*x^56+165768*G^2*x^55-462192*G^2*x^54+1047150*G^2*x^53-1976319*G^2*x^52+3165417*G^2*x^51-4355478*G^2*x^50+5178408*G^2*x^49-5321265*G^2*x^48+4707726*G^2*x^47-3561006*G^2*x^46+2279682*G^2*x^45-1217598*G^2*x^44+533064*G^2*x^43-188451*G^2*x^42+53946*G^2*x^41-12921*G^2*x^40+2619*G^2*x^39-387*G^2*x^38+27*G^2*x^37-2*G*x^58+42*G*x^57-408*G*x^56+2444*G*x^55-10152*G*x^54+31192*G*x^53-73962*G*x^52+139912*G*x^51-217714*G*x^50+287294*G*x^49-330294*G*x^48+335984*G*x^47-301698*G*x^46+234882*G*x^45-154344*G*x^44+82838*G*x^43-34774*G*x^42+10694*G*x^41-2152*G*x^40+222*G*x^39-4*G*x^38+x^51-20*x^50+157*x^49-683*x^48+1893*x^47-3594*x^46+4879*x^45-4873*x^44+3660*x^43-2103*x^42+928*x^41-304*x^40+66*x^39-7*x^38)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
